aesthetic: Tropical Noir / Epic Gaming Media. High visual impact, cinematic full-bleed imagery, strong editorial typography, immersive scrolling.
design_principles: Dark mode first: Default reading environment is deep midnight to make neon and sunset imagery pop.
Cinematic scale: Oversized hero typography, heavy use of negative space, full-bleed imagery.
Bento modularity: For data-heavy pages (IMDb style), use structured bento grids with 1px subtle borders.
Progressive disclosure: Netflix-style horizontal rails keep the homepage clean while offering deep content on hover.

netflix_horizontal_rail.container: flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory gap-4 pb-8 hide-scrollbar
netflix_horizontal_rail.card: relative flex-none w-[280px] md:w-[320px] aspect-[16/9] snap-center rounded-lg overflow-hidden group cursor-pointer border border-white/5 bg-zinc-900 transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:z-10 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-pink-500/20
netflix_horizontal_rail.card_image: absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-110 opacity-70 group-hover:opacity-100
netflix_horizontal_rail.card_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/40 to-transparent
netflix_horizontal_rail.card_content: absolute bottom-0 p-4 w-full transform transition-transform duration-300 translate-y-4 group-hover:translate-y-0
netflix_horizontal_rail.card_metadata: opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 text-sm text-zinc-400 mt-2 flex gap-2 items-center

gamespot_article.hero_section: relative w-full h-[70vh] min-h-[500px] flex flex-col justify-end pb-16 px-4 md:px-12 lg:px-24
gamespot_article.hero_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#050505] via-[#050505]/60 to-transparent z-10
gamespot_article.article_container: max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 py-12 text-lg leading-relaxed text-zinc-300
gamespot_article.drop_cap: float-left text-7xl font-serif text-white mr-4 mt-2 leading-none
gamespot_article.pull_quote: border-l-4 border-[#FF2A6D] pl-6 my-10 py-2 text-3xl font-serif text-white italic
gamespot_article.inline_image: w-full my-12 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-white/10

imdb_data_profile.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-12 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8
imdb_data_profile.data_row: border-b border-white/10 py-4 flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:gap-4
imdb_data_profile.data_label: text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider text-sm w-48 font-semibold

hero_billboard.container: relative w-full h-screen min-h-[600px] flex items-center
hero_billboard.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-black/90 via-black/50 to-transparent z-10
hero_billboard.content: relative z-20 max-w-4xl px-8 md:px-16 space-y-6

layout_and_spacing.nav_bar: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 py-4 px-8
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use subgrid where possible for data density. Otherwise standard 12-col grid gap-6.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT USE INTER. Install and use 'Bebas Neue' for Display, 'Playfair Display' for Editorial Serifs, and 'Outfit' for body.
Data structure for the site should heavily rely on seed data. Create robust JSON mock data for Articles, Characters, Locations, and Vehicles.
For the Landing page, implement the 'hero_billboard' class specs, followed by multiple 'netflix_horizontal_rail' carousels (News, Characters, Locations, Vehicles).
For the Article pages, implement the 'gamespot_article' specs. The hero image MUST sit behind the title, bleeding to the edges. Ensure drop caps and pull quotes use the editorial serif font.
For Character/Vehicle details, implement 'imdb_data_profile'. Use strict bento grids and key-value borders to achieve data density.
Hover states are critical for the Netflix-style rails. Ensure the transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 is applied so cards pop out.
Never use generic placeholder images. Map the provided media URLs to the seed data.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='nav-articles-link').

Since Shadcn is meant for admin dashboards, rely on raw Tailwind for the landing, article, and profile layouts to get the exact asymmetrical/editorial look. Use Shadcn ONLY for things like dropdowns, modals, or forms if needed.
